plugins.name: opspal-salesforce
plugins.description: Comprehensive Salesforce operations — CPQ/Q2C assessments, RevOps auditing, Flow management, permission orchestration, territory management, deployment automation.

plugins.name: opspal-hubspot
plugins.description: Full HubSpot CRM operations — workflow automation, contact/deal management, marketing campaigns, CMS, SEO, Service Hub, revenue intelligence.

plugins.name: opspal-core
plugins.description: Cross-platform orchestration — diagram generation, PDF/PPTX output, RevOps reporting, sales funnel diagnostics, data quality, Asana integration.

plugins.name: opspal-marketo
plugins.description: Marketo marketing automation — lead management, smart campaigns, email marketing, program architecture, analytics, lead scoring, MQL handoff.

plugins.name: opspal-gtm-planning
plugins.description: GTM Annual Planning — territory design, quota modeling (Monte Carlo), compensation planning, attribution governance, strategic reporting.

plugins.name: opspal-monday
plugins.description: Monday.com integration — file extraction, board management, task synchronization.

plugins.name: opspal-ai-consult
plugins.description: Multi-model AI consultation with Gemini integration.

plugins.name: opspal-mcp-client
plugins.description: Thin client for OpsPal proprietary MCP server — validation hooks and resolver only, ships no IP.

plugins.name: opspal-okrs
plugins.description: OKR lifecycle management — strategy orchestration, data-driven objective generation, initiative scoring, executive reporting, PLG signals, cadence management.
